description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a minimalist cubic design, featuring clean white facades and large rectangular windows arranged in a grid pattern. The structure includes three visible stories, with the top floor set back to create a rooftop terrace with green landscaping. The ground level has an open carport with space for two vehicles, and a wide driveway leading to the street. The property is surrounded by several trees and landscaped greenery, enhancing its urban residential appeal. The main entryway is accessible via a short set of steps and is partially sheltered by the overhanging upper floors. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with flat roofs and a focus on geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, three-story cubic house with white facades, flat roofs, a rooftop terrace, and an open carport, surrounded by trees and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open carport, main entry steps, and symmetrical window arrangement, with driveway and trees flanking the property.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat, unadorned wall, rooftop terrace, and additional landscaping, with the driveway extending to the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the setback rooftop terrace, more windows, and the continuation of the driveway and trees.
description_view_3: Side view showing the carport from an angle, the stepped-back upper floor, and the tree-lined driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a short set of steps, partially sheltered by the overhanging upper floor, minimalistic with no porch or decorative columns.
